name: apptivo
description: Reads Apptivo CRM customers, contacts, leads, and opportunities through the Apptivo REST DAO API (full refresh); deletes CRM customer records via the documented deleteCustomer DAO action.

risk.read: external Apptivo API read of CRM customer, contact, lead, and opportunity data
risk.write: external mutation: irreversibly deletes a CRM customer record
risk.approval: required; remove_customer is a destructive, irreversible external deletion
